risks.title: Donald Trump bizarrely tells Gianni Infantino to host next World Cup in the US with China
risks.description: US President Donald Trump has a strange proposal for FIFA President Gianni Infantino. The 2026 FIFA World Cup has been hosted by the US, Mexico, and Canada, with Donald Trump’s country hosting the majority of the games.

risks.description: On Sunday, the world will be watching as Spain meet Argentina for the 2026 FIFA World Cup final. The natural grass surface it is played on may look mundane, but is the product of years of painstaking research and development.

risks.title: Donald Trump takes shot at Thomas Tuchel’s ‘unusual’ use of his good friend Harry Kane vs. Argentina
risks.description: England’s dream of ending the 60-year FIFA World Cup drought came at a crashing end against Argentina. Harry Kane’s England took on Argentina during the 2026 FIFA World Cup semifinals, and they nearly clinched a spot in the finals.

risks.title: Trump threatens Canada over wildfires ahead of World Cup final (VIDEOS)
risks.description: US President Donald Trump has threatened to impose additional tariffs on Canada over wildfire smoke that has blanketed much of the northeastern United States, just days before the FIFA World Cup final in New Jersey.
